## [00:00 - 00:33]

Hi, I'm Layne Amon and I am the Director of Content at Mastermind.com. I love content. It is my life, whether it's a book or a course or an audio or a video, I love consuming new information and then teaching other people. So when I have the opportunity, like in Mastermind Business System, to teach you how to get your knowledge to the people who most need it, it's like a dream come true. I want you to create amazing content. I want you to create an amazing course because people need what you have to teach them.
